anchor_hint: case "tool-result" handler — replace unconditional finishToolCall with status check on metadata.toolStatus
Two edits: (1) add status to tool.execute.after properties for builtin tools, (2) add status to tool.execute.after properties for MCP tools
content:
**Edit 1 — Builtin tools (around line 121-125):**

Replace the `plugin.trigger("tool.execute.after", ...)` call to include `status` in properties:

Before:
```
              yield* plugin.trigger(
                "tool.execute.after",
                { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args },
                output,
              )
```

After:
```
              yield* plugin.trigger(
                "tool.execute.after",
                { tool: item.id, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: ctx.callID, args, status: (result as any).metadata?.toolStatus ?? "succeeded" },
                output,
              )
```

**Edit 2 — MCP tools (around line 172-176):**

Replace the `plugin.trigger("tool.execute.after", ...)` call to include `status` in properties:

Before:
```
          yield* plugin.trigger(
            "tool.execute.after",
            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId, args },
            result,
          )
```

After:
```
          yield* plugin.trigger(
            "tool.execute.after",
            { tool: key, sessionID: ctx.sessionID, callID: opts.toolCallId, args, status: "succeeded" },
            result,
          )
```
